projectDescription: AI-powered real estate property valuation platform that delivers precise, appraiser-verified property reports using machine learning, big data from 76 sources, and expert knowledge.
keyFeatures: AI-powered property valuation accurate to within 2.3%
Data aggregation from 76 sources including market, legal, and spatial data
Price forecasts up to 20 quarters into the future
Investment analysis with ROI, ROE, and sensitivity analysis
Legal verification of Land and Mortgage Register (Księga Wieczysta)
Environmental risk assessment (floods, noise, air quality)
Two plan tiers: Basic and Pro
publicApiSurface: Property valuation form (30 fields: address, floor area, rooms, floor, building type, condition, amenities, window orientation, parking, heating, Land Register number)
Basic report — concise market summary, basic spatial/legal/investment analysis, basic forecasts
Pro report — full comprehensive report with charts, extended market/legal/investment analysis, extended price forecasts, decision-support tool
Payment methods: BLIK, bank transfers, credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, PayPal, installments (Tpay)
